Get Started
Login
Simple, connected spend & travel management
AI-powered expense, travel, and invoice solutions that unify your data, simplify work, and drive your business forward.
See a demo
Request pricing
People set the direction. AI executes.
The Autonomous Enterprise
is a future in which AI grounds every human decision in real-time intelligence, automates end-to-end workflows, and improves every process so businesses can exceed every expectation.
Explore the future of business
Concur Expense
Expenses anywhere, anytime
Auto-capture receipts and generate reports
Apply and update spending policies instantly
Connect effortlessly to your financial systems
Make smarter decisions with data-driven insights
Learn about Concur Expense
Take a tour
Concur Travel
Business travel as it should be
Agentic AI assistant trained on your policies
Unmatched supplier content & booking options
Flexible integrations and the freedom to work with any TMC or GDS
User-friendly booking experience, offering the most convenient, safe and sustainable travel options
Learn about Concur Travel
Begin your tour
Concur Invoice
Accounts payable made easy
Automated, connected accounts payable
Prevent duplicate or incorrect payments
Simplify reporting and audits with real-time visibility into cash flow
Unify travel, expense, and AP into one holistic view
Learn about Concur Invoice
Start your tour
Integrations
Our tools work with your tools, right from the start
Choose from 300+ pre-built connectors and custom integrations that allow our solutions to work with your existing systems. If you need a custom integration—no problem—our open APIs make that possible for developers.
Learn more about integrations
Watch a short demo from our solution experts
Concur Expense
Watch Expense demo
Concur Travel
Watch Travel demo
Concur Invoice
Watch Invoice demo
Industry leaders in AI-powered T&E tools
Not only are we #1 on G2, but we are also the only T&E company to be named an AI leader across enterprise, midmarket, small business, and travel-booking applications.
IDC MarketScape T&E Software 2025
Trusted by users from companies of all sizes
< 500 Employees
“The automation not only saves time for employees and finance teams but also provides a clear overview of expenses, making reporting and follow-up significantly more efficient.”
Read the full review
500+ Employees
“This is a powerful tool for automating expense, travel, and invoice management. Its ability to integrate with other systems, such as ERPs, leads to significant time savings.”
Read the full review
10,000+ Employees
“What I like best about SAP Concur is how it simplifies and streamlines expense and travel management. It saves time, reduces errors, and provides clear visibility into spending, making processes more efficient for both employees and finance teams.”
Read the full review
FAQs about SAP Concur
What is SAP Concur?
SAP Concur is a cloud-based platform that helps you manage expense, travel, and invoice processes in one place. Our solutions automate how employees submit expenses, book travel, and handle invoices, while giving companies better visibility and control over their spending.
More about Concur
Is SAP Concur suitable for different business sizes?
Yes. SAP Concur solutions are designed for businesses of all sizes. Our flexible, centralized platform is built to grow with you, allowing you to scale your spend management along with your business.
Learn about scalability
How does SAP Concur help control spend?
SAP Concur helps control spend by giving you real-time visibility into where your money’s going and adding guardrails along the way. It automates processes, enforces policies, and flags unusual or out-of-policy expenses so you can make smarter spending decisions.
Learn about cost control
Does SAP Concur integrate with other solutions?
Yes. SAP Concur integrates with your existing HR, payroll, finance, CRM and more so you can manage everything in one place. We make it easy by offering pre-built connectors and integrations, or you can customize integrations for your specific business needs.
Learn about integrations
Does SAP Concur use AI?
Yes. SAP Concur has had AI and machine learning embedded in our solutions for over a decade. It works behind the scenes to automate tasks, capture receipt data, flag unusual or out-of-policy expenses, and spot potential fraud by analyzing spending patterns.
Learn about Concur and AI
There’s never been a better time for the best spend management
Contact sales
To learn more about SAP Concur and hear from a representative, please complete the form.

hits.title: Hipmunk Co-Founders Spurned by SAP Concur in Attempt to Buy Back the Company
Views into How AI Is Freeing Employees to Do the Work That Matters
SAP Agrees to Buy Concur Technologies for Enterprise Value of $8.3B

analysis.name: SAP Concur
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered expense, travel, and invoice solutions that unify data, automate workflows, and give companies real-time visibility and control over spending.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance and travel managers at mid-to-large enterprises needing unified T&E, AP, and compliance automation with ERP integration

features.name: expense report automation
features.description: Automates creation and submission of expense reports from captured receipts

features.name: receipt auto-capture
features.description: Automatically captures and digitizes receipts via mobile or email

features.name: spending policy enforcement
features.description: Applies and updates company spending policies automatically at point of spend
features.evidence_quote: Apply and update spending policies instantly

features.name: real-time spend visibility
features.description: Provides live dashboards and visibility into where company money is going
features.evidence_quote: giving you real-time visibility into where your money's going and adding guardrails along the way

features.name: out-of-policy expense flagging
features.description: Automatically flags unusual or out-of-policy expenses for review
features.evidence_quote: flags unusual or out-of-policy expenses so you can make smarter spending decisions

features.name: data-driven spend insights
features.description: Analytics and reporting on spending patterns to inform decisions
features.evidence_quote: Make smarter decisions with data-driven insights

features.name: financial system integration
features.description: Connects expense and invoice data to ERP and financial systems
features.evidence_quote: Connect effortlessly to your financial systems

features.name: agentic ai travel assistant
features.description: AI assistant trained on company travel policies to guide booking decisions
features.evidence_quote: Agentic AI assistant trained on your policies

features.name: travel booking
features.description: In-platform business travel booking with supplier content and GDS access

features.name: tmc and gds integration
features.description: Flexible integrations allowing use of any travel management company or GDS
features.evidence_quote: Flexible integrations and the freedom to work with any TMC or GDS

features.name: sustainable travel management
features.description: Tools to track and optimize business travel for sustainability goals
features.evidence_quote: User-friendly booking experience, offering the most convenient, safe and sustainable travel options

features.name: accounts payable automation
features.description: End-to-end automated AP processing for invoice receipt through payment

features.name: duplicate payment detection
features.description: Prevents duplicate or incorrect invoice payments

features.name: cash flow visibility
features.description: Real-time reporting on AP and cash flow for audits and finance teams
features.evidence_quote: Simplify reporting and audits with real-time visibility into cash flow

features.name: unified t&e and ap view
features.description: Single platform combining travel, expense, and accounts payable data
features.evidence_quote: Unify travel, expense, and AP into one holistic view

features.name: budget management
features.description: Budget tracking and controls across travel, expense, and invoice modules

features.name: bank card feeds
features.description: Automatic import of corporate card transactions into expense reports

features.name: company bill statements
features.description: Management and reconciliation of company-level billing statements

features.name: fraud and compliance detection
features.description: Concur Detect identifies non-compliant, duplicate, or potentially fraudulent claims

features.name: pre-spend request and approval
features.description: Concur Request enables pre-trip and pre-purchase approval workflows

features.name: mileage tracking
features.description: Drive product for tracking and reimbursing employee mileage

features.name: intelligent audit
features.description: Automated auditing of expense claims using AI/rules to flag anomalies

features.name: expense verification
features.description: Verify product for validating receipts and expense claim legitimacy

features.name: triplink (unmanaged travel capture)
features.description: Captures travel booked outside managed channels into the T&E system

features.name: payment solutions
features.description: Integrated payment processing for invoice and expense reimbursement

features.name: purchase request management
features.description: Automated purchase request creation and approval before invoice receipt

features.name: three-way match
features.description: Matches purchase orders, receipts, and invoices to prevent payment errors

features.name: analytics and reporting
features.description: Spend analytics and dashboards across all T&E and invoice data

features.name: consultative intelligence
features.description: Advisory-layer analytics delivering benchmarks and strategic spend insights

features.name: data delivery service
features.description: Automated export and delivery of spend data to downstream systems or BI tools

features.name: intelligence reporting suite
features.description: Advanced reporting and business intelligence product layer

features.name: tiered support offerings
features.description: Multiple support tiers: Essential, Advanced, and Select Care for different SLA needs
features.evidence_quote: Concur Advanced Care / Concur Essential Care / Concur Select Care

features.name: in-app guided assistance (walkme)
features.description: WalkMe Premium integration for in-app user guidance and onboarding

features.name: managed rate administration
features.description: Managed service for negotiating and administering hotel/travel rates

features.name: user support desk
features.description: Dedicated support desk service for end-user T&E questions

features.description: Traveler safety and location tracking to fulfill employer duty of care obligations

features.description: VAT reclaim and global tax compliance tools for multinational businesses

features.evidence_quote: SAP Concur integrates with your existing HR, payroll, finance

features.name: premium ai assistant
features.description: Premium AI-powered assistant product for guided spend and travel decisions

features.name: autonomous workflow automation
features.description: AI-driven end-to-end process automation across expense, travel, and invoice
features.evidence_quote: AI grounds every human decision in real-time intelligence, automates end-to-end workflows

differentiators: Only T&E company named an AI leader across enterprise, midmarket, small business, and travel-booking applications
Named in IDC MarketScape T&E Software 2025
300+ pre-built connectors plus open API for custom integrations
Agentic AI assistant trained on company-specific policies
Unified platform covering expense, travel, and AP in a single solution
Works with any TMC or GDS — no lock-in

praised: The automation not only saves time for employees and finance teams but also provides a clear overview of expenses, making reporting and follow-up significantly more efficient.
This is a powerful tool for automating expense, travel, and invoice management. Its ability to integrate with other systems, such as ERPs, leads to significant time savings.
It simplifies and streamlines expense and travel management. It saves time, reduces errors, and provides clear visibility into spending.
complaints: Software horror show: SAP Concur (HN thread, 356 upvotes, 190 comments — significant negative sentiment signal)
Second 'software horror show' thread (198 upvotes, 181 comments) — consistent theme of poor UX/reliability
Hipmunk co-founders spurned by SAP Concur when attempting to buy back their company — suggests organizational/strategic friction

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned 404. No public pricing tiers available. All pricing requires a quote request via 'Request Pricing' CTA. Product is modular — customers likely license Expense, Travel, and Invoice separately or as bundles.
